_comment: Stage-1 v2 data mix (G2-r05, 2026-06-05). Entries match hive partitions <dataset>/<domain> under each --dataset_path root (matched by root basename). Unmatched partitions default to repeat=1. Fractional repeat = per-epoch deterministic shard subset (epoch-rotating so successive epochs cover the remainder). Schema reserves max_len/thinking_mode for the future long-context stage (unused here: global max_len 12288, thinking render).
